---
title: 'Yarn Doll Creations'
date: '2014-02-20T00:00:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Texas Cows and Crafts'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '5374031237429974081'
blogger_filename: '/2014/02/introducing-my-newest-creation-yarn.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Texas Cows and Crafts/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Threads'
  - 'Dolls'
  - 'Yarn Dolls'
---

<div style="text-align: left;">
<h3 style="text-align: center;">
Introducing My Newest Creation : Yarn Dolls</h3>
&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; Here are my mop doll inspired Yarn Dolls...each one is unique and has its own special qualities. Some are inspired by Seasons, Holidays, and Hobby's. Others are inspired by color combinations and while having fun creating something new...here are a few of the girls...</div>
<div style="text-align: left;">
<br /></div>
<div style="text-align: left;">
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/2964-crpd-6378e510f2cf.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/2964-crpd-6378e510f2cf.jpg" height="320" width="296" /></a></div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
Holly and Gracie</div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/2893-crpd-a40e11e1cc8e.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: right; float: right; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-left: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/2893-crpd-a40e11e1cc8e.jpg" height="261" width="320" /></a><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/gracie-up-close-5bffef6dd2ad.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/gracie-up-close-5bffef6dd2ad.jpg" height="320" width="240" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/3021-crpd-e37a39236101.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/3021-crpd-e37a39236101.jpg" height="239" width="320" /></a></div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
Debbie, Angela and Annabel</div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<br /></div>
<div class="" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-3022-e95b46c5e68e.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: left; float: left; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"></a><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/angela-and-annabel-4c61649f829a.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: right; float: right; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-left: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/angela-and-annabel-4c61649f829a.jpg" height="292" width="320" /></a><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-3022-e95b46c5e68e.jpg" imageanchor="1"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-3022-e95b46c5e68e.jpg" height="320" width="240" /></a>&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp;</div>
<br />
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/autumn-5eee7d29f57b.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em; text-align: center;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/autumn-5eee7d29f57b.jpg" height="320" width="221" /></a></div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
Autumn</div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<br /></div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<br /></div>
Thank you for visiting Texas Cows and Crafts!<br />
<br />
Please contact me with any questions or special&nbsp;requests:&nbsp;<a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/p/about-us.html">Click here.</a><br />
<br />
Flavia Wolfe<br />
<br />
<a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/">http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com</a><br />
<br />
<a href="http://www.etsy.com/shop/TexasCowsAndCrafts" target="_blank">Connect and Shop on &nbsp;our Etsy Store</a><br />
<br />
<a href="https://www.facebook.com/pages/Texas-Cows-Crafts/298135563538323" target="_blank">Connect on Facebook</a><br />
<br />
<a href="https://plus.google.com/b/118156879240088112738/118156879240088112738/posts" target="_blank">Connect on Google+</a><br />
<br />
<iframe allowtransparency="true" frameborder="0" scrolling="no" src="https://www.facebook.com/plugins/likebox.php?href=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fpages%2FTexas-Cows-and-Crafts%2F298135563538323&amp;width=292&amp;height=62&amp;colorscheme=light&amp;show_faces=false&amp;border_color&amp;stream=false&amp;header=true" style="border-style: none; height: 100px; overflow: hidden; width: 250px;"></iframe><br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<span id="goog_1254403250"></span><span id="goog_1254403251"></span><br /></div>

<!-- Blogger automated replacement: "https://images-blogger-opensocial.googleusercontent.com/gadgets/proxy?url=http%3A%2F%2F1.bp.blogspot.com%2F-h4CMZvTGfc8%2FUwVDDYd_EQI%2FAAAAAAAAVVg%2FOl0RMNFQfbo%2Fs1600%2FIMG_3022.JPG&amp;container=blogger&amp;gadget=a&amp;rewriteMime=image%2F*" with "/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-3022-e95b46c5e68e.jpg" -->
